claim.statement: When using optimistic UI, snapshot prior state before applying the optimistic change, reconcile against the authoritative server response, and roll back cleanly on failure. Guard against stale responses with per-request identity so only the latest mutation commits or reverts.

limitations: Optimistic UI is risky for irreversible or financial writes; reconciliation and conflict handling are domain-specific

do: Capture a rollback snapshot before mutating local state
Re-sync from the server (refetch/invalidate) after the mutation settles
Tag mutations with request identity and ignore outdated responses
avoid: Optimistic UI with no rollback path
Applying optimistic updates to irreversible or money-moving actions without confirmation
